cards.back: The branch of image processing that deals with the shape and size of images using mathematical operations
A morphological operation that reduces the size of an image by removing small details or noise
A morphological operation that increases the size of an image by adding new details or noise
A morphological operation that is the combination of erosion and dilation, used to remove small details or noise
A morphological operation that is the combination of dilation and erosion, used to fill holes or gaps in an image
